evidence_quotes.quote: loopholes and misleading practices in online membership contracts.

paragraphs.text: Student of the Jean Monnet Modules project “DERECHO”: ‘Defense of European Rights and Excellence for Consumers HHarmonisation’, No 101239437. Project financed by the European Union. Jean Monnet Actions in the field of Higher Education: Modules. Call for tenders ERASMUS-JMO-2025-HEI-TCH-RSCH. During these months, we have reflected on the importance of the Digital Equity Act. This is about protecting consumers and users, and simplifying the rules to protect them. I therefore agree with the application of that law, since it will bring very great benefits. First, it is a solution tool, because it will eradicate a large number of problems we are currently experiencing as a result of loopholes and misleading practices in online membership contracts. It also boosts digital education and skills to adapt to the labour market of the future in the European Union.
